props.ChoiceText: A tour of parishes, stores, and habits taught you how many local compromises are needed to keep one faith looking whole.
props.ChoiceBio: A visitation taught you that order in the church is partly made of tolerated imperfection.

0.TransitionText: Because a visitation taught you that order in the church is partly made of tolerated imperfection, church office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Prelate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A parish priest, sacristan, or steward still remembers your inspection.
